## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to review SEO performance, discuss content strategy, and evaluate outbound email campaign progress.](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO traffic growing steadily (991 visitors/month), with 31,000 impressions and 385 clicks total](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Website refresh planned for January; need to ensure SEO gains aren't lost](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Outbound email campaign showing promise (5 replies in 1 week) but needs optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Financial advisors seek all-in-one AI tools that simplify workflows and aid compliance](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [31,000 impressions, 385 clicks total](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [\~991 monthly visitors, approaching 1,000/month milestone](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [25 keywords ranking in top 10, 138 queries generated](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [CTR improved: some blogs getting 5-7 clicks per 100 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Weekly performance: 93 clicks (6 days), 5,000+ impressions (vs. 3,000 previous week)](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Shifting focus to bottom-of-funnel content to drive conversions](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [New articles on private meeting transcription, healthcare/finance/legal use cases](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Plan to refresh existing articles, positioning Knapsack as central solution](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Mark suggested creating articles around specific Knapsack automations (e.g., profile lookup, custom planner, compliance tracking)](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

### Domain Authority Concerns

  - [Score stuck at 2 for 3+ months](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Lack of aggressive backlinking strategy identified as potential cause](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Team to explore more aggressive backlinking approaches](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Outbound Email Campaign Progress

  - [Running since Dec 11th, 5 total replies (4 demo requests, 1 general inquiry)](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Open rates around 30-40%, aiming for 40-55%](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Plan to test new subject lines to improve open rates](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Need to emphasize Knapsack as all-in-one solution, automate back/mid-office tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Highlight compliance automation features](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

### Financial Advisor Insights

  - [Prefer buying from industry insiders; seek validation of financial advisory expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Overwhelmed by point solutions; desire all-in-one tools](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Want to automate back-office tasks to focus on client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Compliance management is a significant pain point](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement aggressive backlinking strategy to improve domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Publish bottom-of-funnel articles focused on Knapsack automations](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Optimize email subject lines and content to address financial advisor pain points](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Set up follow-up campaign for initial responders who didn't convert](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Increase email volume for next 3 days (Dec 19-21), then pause for holidays](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Prepare for January website refresh, ensuring SEO gains are maintained](https://fathom.video/share/Bauij_7WcMc2xxi-r691vnxXuyPghiUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
